# AI Healthcare SaaS Platform

## Tech Stack
- React 18 + TypeScript
- Vite (build tool)
- Tailwind CSS (styling)
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Lucide React (icons)
- Recharts (charts/graphs)
- React Router DOM (routing)

## Design Guidelines
- Medical SaaS aesthetic: blue primary, neutral background, soft shadows, rounded cards
- Clean typography using Inter font family
- Responsive layout for desktop and mobile
- AI-first experience — the chat assistant is the central interaction point

## Component Structure
- Components in `src/components/` — reusable UI components
- Pages in `src/pages/` — route-level page components
- Utility functions in `src/lib/utils.ts`
